steps.title: Look for an increase
steps.content: The researcher needs an example of a lake whose duration of winter surface ice increased, despite the general declining trend. That requires comparing the same lake at two times and showing more ice days later than earlier.

steps.title: Reject incomplete comparisons
steps.content: A and C give totals or thresholds without proving an increase from the earlier winter to the later winter. D claims an increase for two lakes, but the graph does not support that for both. The answer is B.
